series_metadata.series_description: Surveys completed by Consumers and returned to OOD anonymously. Records may include: Annual Review Survey, Post Plan Survey, Closure 26 Survey, Closure 28 Survey, Extended Employment Survey, Ineligibility Survey, and any additional consumer satisfaction surveys.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records for two (2) calendar years from the date received by OOD. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain records for two (2) calendar years from the date received by OOD. Destroy when no longer of administrative value., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
